omitted_declarations.policy_reference: 3.3. We also work with third parties, who may be recipients of your Personal Data, such as: our business partners who are social media platforms and with whom we may share some of your Data, for example to create and broadcast targeted advertising campaigns on their platforms; our business partners who can advertise their services on our platforms and to whom you can decide to subscribe. These can be in particular insurance, banking, car rental partners. When you decide to subscribe to their services, you authorise us to provide them with your Personal Data necessary for the conclusion of your contract with them; our subcontractors (in particular technical, commercial and payment services, identity verification or providers of analytical solutions).
